final_prompt.prompt:
Create a profile avatar for a lifestyle tech content creator.

Style/medium: needs a modern minimalist aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product iconography, Scandinavian design heritage, Japanese MUJI visual language; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered, balanced for use as circular crop on all major platforms
Subject: must include abstract or symbolic elements representing new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods — exact visual metaphor is yours
Scene/backdrop: must be clean and neutral, suitable for both Chinese and international social platforms
Lighting/mood: needs a calm, professional atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: must be culturally neutral, avoiding colors with strong regional or religious associations
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must avoid symbols, gestures, or imagery that could offend specific cultural or religious groups; must work harmoniously as circular avatar on WeChat, Weibo, Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok
Avoid: must not include religious symbols, national flags, hand gestures, human faces, or text in any language
